steps.title: Read the roots directly from factored form
steps.content: $(x-4)(x+2)(x-1) = 0$ gives roots $x = 4, -2, 1$. No expansion needed — each factor $(x - r)$ contributes root $r$.

steps.title: Multiply the roots (Vieta shortcut: product = c/a)
steps.content: Product of roots $= 4 \times (-2) \times 1 = -8$. (For a monic cubic $x^3 + \ldots + c$, Vieta confirms product $= -c/1$; reading from the factors is faster.) That matches choice D — D is correct.
